since_last: 94% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +5.02%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 94% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.90% · BTC +1.63% · Gold +3.26% · Nasdaq100 +3.12%. 94% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +5.02%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +5.02%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +2.42%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SPCX is the standout at +13.91%
cards.body: Leaders: SPCX +13.91%, SMR +10.72%, SOUN +9.93%, MU +9.57%, MRVL +8.49%. Laggards: IBM -1.34%, TTD -0.96%, CSCO -0.44%, KLAC -0.34%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +13.91% at $183.34
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +13.91% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
